title: Bootstrap-stage uninstall helpers (skills + hook scripts + un-merge configs + pointer-strippers)
description: Create `packages/cli/src/install/uninstall-skills-and-hooks.ts` mirroring `install/skills-and-hooks.ts`. Implement: (1) skill removers — delete each SKILL.md from SKILL_DESTINATIONS (6 files = 3 skills × 2 clients), then rmdir empty parent skill-name dir; (2) hook-script removers — delete each .cjs from HOOK_SCRIPT_DESTINATIONS (9 files = 3 hooks × 3 clients); (3) un-merge helpers for the 3 config files (.claude/settings.json, .codex/hooks.json, .cursor/hooks.json) — conservative: filter each arrayAppendPath array to remove entries whose `command` field matches FABRIC_HOOK_COMMAND_PATHS for that client; with `--clean-empties` flag, cascade-remove empty arrays/objects up to the parent hooks/events key; (4) pointer-line strippers — read each POINTER_TARGETS file (CLAUDE.md / AGENTS.md / .cursor/rules), remove lines containing POINTER_LINE / REVIEW_POINTER_LINE / IMPORT_POINTER_LINE; preserve file unless it becomes empty AND init created it (cannot prove → preserve). All operations idempotent + best-effort: missing artifacts log skipped, do not throw.

files.change: Import constants from ./skills-and-hooks.ts (SKILL_DESTINATIONS, HOOK_SCRIPT_DESTINATIONS, HOOK_CONFIG_TARGETS, HOOK_CONFIG_ARRAY_PATHS, FABRIC_HOOK_COMMAND_PATHS, POINTER_TARGETS, POINTER_LINE, REVIEW_POINTER_LINE, IMPORT_POINTER_LINE). Export: uninstallFabricArchiveSkill / uninstallFabricReviewSkill / uninstallFabricImportSkill (each removes its 2 SKILL.md files + the now-empty parent skill dir); removeArchiveHintHook / removeKnowledgeHintBroadHook / removeKnowledgeHintNarrowHook (each removes its 3 .cjs files); unmergeClaudeCodeHookConfig / unmergeCodexHookConfig / unmergeCursorHookConfig (each takes opts.cleanEmpties: boolean, filters fabric entries by command-path match, conditionally cascade-removes empty containers); stripArchiveSkillPointers (reads each POINTER_TARGETS file, removes the 3 pointer lines, writes back if changed, deletes file only if it becomes empty AND a forensic check confirms init created it — currently NO such forensic exists, so default to preserve always per clarification #9). Each helper returns InstallStepResult with status 'removed' | 'skipped' | 'error'. Provide top-level uninstallBootstrapStage(target, opts) that runs all helpers best-effort and returns InstallStepResult[].

implementation: Read packages/cli/src/install/skills-and-hooks.ts in full (especially L86-L409) to confirm the install helper contracts: each writes specific paths, returns InstallStepResult, is idempotent.

Create packages/cli/src/install/uninstall-skills-and-hooks.ts. Import all required constants from ./skills-and-hooks.js (TASK-001 made them exports). Define internal helpers: rmIfExists(path) → InstallStepResult, rmDirIfEmpty(path) → InstallStepResult.
Implement 3 skill removers: each iterates SKILL_DESTINATIONS[skillKey] = [claudePath, codexPath], rmIfExists each, then rmDirIfEmpty the parent skill-name dir (.claude/skills/fabric-archive/ etc.).
Implement 3 hook-script removers: each iterates HOOK_SCRIPT_DESTINATIONS[hookKey] = [claude, codex, cursor], rmIfExists each. Do NOT rmdir client hooks/ parent (may contain other client hooks).

Implement 3 un-merge helpers. For each: readJson(HOOK_CONFIG_TARGETS[clientKey]); for each array path in HOOK_CONFIG_ARRAY_PATHS[clientKey]: walk to the array; filter out entries where any nested `command` field matches FABRIC_HOOK_COMMAND_PATHS[clientKey]; if opts.cleanEmpties && resulting array is empty → delete the key from parent; cascade up: if parent object is now empty (no own keys) AND opts.cleanEmpties → delete it too. atomicWriteJson back. If config file missing → status='skipped'. If file unchanged → status='skipped'. Use deep-equal short-circuit.

Implement stripArchiveSkillPointers: for each path in POINTER_TARGETS: if existsSync, readFileSync, split lines, filter out lines that contain any of (POINTER_LINE | REVIEW_POINTER_LINE | IMPORT_POINTER_LINE); if changed, atomicWriteText. Per clarification #9: NEVER delete the file even if empty (cannot prove ownership). Return InstallStepResult per pointer target.

Implement top-level uninstallBootstrapStage(target, opts: { cleanEmpties: boolean }): orchestrate all helpers in reverse order of install (per hooks.ts:L105-L133 invocation order, REVERSED): stripArchiveSkillPointers → un-merge 3 configs → remove 9 hook scripts → remove 6 skill files + empty skill dirs. Aggregate InstallStepResult[]. Wrap each helper invocation in try/catch → on throw, push {step, path, status:'error', message: err.message}. Never throw out of uninstallBootstrapStage.

Verify the un-merge command-path match is robust: install writes entries with `command` fields like '.claude/hooks/fabric-hint.cjs'; un-merge must match exactly that path string (substring match against FABRIC_HOOK_COMMAND_PATHS values is sufficient because install writes the same constant).

reference.pattern: Mirror inverse of install/skills-and-hooks.ts: every install helper has a remove/un-merge counterpart returning the same InstallStepResult shape so existing summarizers work unchanged.
reference.examples: skills-and-hooks.ts:L86-L153 (skill install) → uninstall counterparts; L165-L263 (hook install) → remove counterparts; L276-L330 (mergeXHookConfig) → unmergeXHookConfig with command-path filtering; L347-L409 (addArchiveSkillPointer) → stripArchiveSkillPointers.

criteria: packages/cli/src/install/uninstall-skills-and-hooks.ts exports exactly 10 helpers (3 skill removers, 3 hook-script removers, 3 un-merge helpers, 1 stripArchiveSkillPointers) + 1 orchestrator (uninstallBootstrapStage).

Each un-merge helper produces an output config that is byte-equal to the pre-install state when (a) install was run on an empty config and (b) opts.cleanEmpties=true. Verified manually: write empty {}, run install merge*, run un-merge with cleanEmpties=true, assert JSON.stringify equality with {}.

Each un-merge helper preserves non-fabric entries verbatim. Verified manually: write a user-authored {hooks:{Stop:[{matcher:'*',hooks:[{type:'command',command:'./my-hook.sh'}]}]}}, run install mergeClaudeCodeHookConfig (which appends fabric entries), run unmergeClaudeCodeHookConfig with cleanEmpties=true, assert resulting JSON deep-equals the original user-authored object.
stripArchiveSkillPointers preserves the file even if pointer-line removal leaves it empty (per clarification #9 — cannot prove init created it).
All helpers return InstallStepResult arrays where every result.status ∈ {'removed','skipped','error'} (verified via TypeScript type check + runtime sample of all 10 helpers).
uninstallBootstrapStage on a project without prior install returns 100% status='skipped' results, exit code 0, no thrown errors.

rationale.chosen_approach: Mirror module structure (install/skills-and-hooks.ts ↔ install/uninstall-skills-and-hooks.ts) so the source of truth for 'what was written' lives co-located with 'what is removed'. Conservative default un-merge (clarification #5): match by command-path, leave empty containers intact unless --clean-empties.
alternatives_considered: Add inverse helpers to install/skills-and-hooks.ts directly — rejected: file grows past readability threshold; separation aids review
Walk arrays generically removing 'anything whose command path includes fabric' — rejected: fragile; explicit match against FABRIC_HOOK_COMMAND_PATHS is bulletproof
decision_factors: Co-location with install source of truth
rationale.tradeoffs: Two modules to keep in sync if templates evolve; mitigated by shared constants from TASK-001.

manual_checks: Seed user-authored .claude/settings.json with permissions + custom Stop hook, run install, run un-merge → user content byte-identical
Run un-merge on missing .codex/hooks.json → status='skipped', no error
Run stripArchiveSkillPointers on AGENTS.md containing only the fabric pointer line → file preserved (empty), status='removed'
success_metrics: Un-merge round-trip on user-authored config: JSON.stringify equality before install/after un-merge with cleanEmpties=true
Pointer strip preserves all non-fabric lines verbatim (line-by-line diff = only fabric pointer lines removed)
uninstallBootstrapStage on never-installed project: all 22 sub-step results have status='skipped'
integration: full bootstrap install → uninstallBootstrapStage round-trip with cleanEmpties=true → all 3 config files JSON-equal to pre-install state
